title: Add labels to automations
excerpt: Expand available fields/column types that can be used in automations to include labels

posts.author: cbrunskill (Catherine Brunskill)
posts.cookedHtml: Expand available fields/column types that can be used in automations to include labels

posts.author: Twolf2u (Teri Wolfenbarger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed! The ability to create an automation that would update status labels would be helpful. Since mirrored columns cannot be used on forms, I’ve had to manually update labels for form selection. Bonus if the automation could be triggered off a status change on another board.

Use Case: Given two boards, Project Board and Volunteer Board. When a Project Board item’s status is updated to “Approved”, updated the status column “Projects” within the Volunteer Board by adding the Project Board item as a label. This will allow selection of the specific project on a form used to track volunteer activity without manually updating each time.

posts.author: jezmynne (Jezmynne Amergin)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. The manual entry of data is quite tedious and automations would solve for that. I want to assign labels when a task is created on a board and I want to assign labels when a task is assigned to a person.
